creator: igor@zynaps.ru
text:
kernel freeze while detect scsi units...

2.2.8R kernel work very well on this machine.

adapter: ahc0 <Adaptec aic7880 Ultra SCSI host adapter> rev 0 int a irq 11 on pci0:3
disk: (ahc0:0:0): "SEAGATE ST34572W 0784" type 0 fixed SCSI 2

How-To-Repeat: download releng22.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/2.2.8-19990112-SNAP/floppies/boot.flp,
write image to disk, boot from it.
